title: Endurance Energy raises $54M to harness a massive untapped energy source
slides: Endurance Energy raised $54M—for what hidden source?
They target heat trapped in abandoned oil wells.
That heat is enough to power entire grids.
You could plug into clean energy without new drilling.
Check if your region has idle wells—act now.
thread_text:
Hidden gold in old wells?

Endurance Energy just raised $54 million to tap heat trapped in abandoned oil wells.

The scale matters.

That underground heat can generate enough electricity to power entire regional grids.

No new drilling needed.

You get clean energy by reusing wells already in the ground.

Massive untapped potential.

Thousands of idle wells sit across the US, waiting to be repurposed.

Check your region.

Does your area have abandoned oil wells? Search state databases today to see if this could power your community.
video_script: $54 million for heat in dead wells.
Abandoned oil wells hide usable heat.
That heat can power entire grids.
Check if your area has idle wells.

script: $54 million for heat in dead wells.
Abandoned oil wells hide usable heat.
That heat can power entire grids.
Check if your area has idle wells.

instagram.caption:
Abandoned oil wells across the US are hiding enough heat to power entire regional grids—without any new drilling. 🔥

Endurance Energy just raised $54 million to tap that geothermal energy trapped in idle wells. This repurposes existing infrastructure instead of starting from scratch. 🛢️🔄⚡

If you cover clean energy or local infrastructure, this is a concrete story that shifts focus from "new projects" to "unlocking what's already there."

Are any of those idle wells sitting in the county where you live? Search your state's database today.
